# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  country: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: number;
}

interface Product {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  stock: number;
  tags: string[];
}

interface Order {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  productId: string;
  quantity: number;
  status: string;
  totalAmount: number;
  createdAt: number;
}

async function handleUsers(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const method = req.method;

  if (method === "POST") {
    const user: User = await req.json();
    await kv.set(["users", user.id], user);
    await kv.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user.id);
    await kv.set(["users_by_country", user.country, user.id], user);
    await kv.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, user }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (method === "GET") {
    const userId = url.searchParams.get("id");
    const email = url.searchParams.get("email");
    const country = url.searchParams.get("country");
    const status = url.searchParams.get("status");
    const minAge = url.searchParams.get("minAge");
    const maxAge = url.searchParams.get("maxAge");
    const limit = parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "100");

    if (userId) {
      const result = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (!result.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(result.value), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    if (email) {
      const idResult = await kv.get<string>(["users_by_email", email]);
      if (!idResult.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
      const userResult = await kv.get<User>(["users", idResult.value]);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(userResult.value), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    let users: User[] = [];

    if (country) {
      const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users_by_country", country] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        const userResult = await kv.get<User>(["users", entry.value.id]);
        if (userResult.value) users.push(userResult.value);
        if (users.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else if (status) {
      const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users_by_status", status] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        const userResult = await kv.get<User>(["users", entry.value.id]);
        if (userResult.value) users.push(userResult.value);
        if (users.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else {
      const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users"] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        if (entry.key.length === 2) {
          users.push(entry.value);
          if (users.length >= limit) break;
        }
      }
    }

    if (minAge || maxAge) {
      const min = minAge ? parseInt(minAge) : 0;
      const max = maxAge ? parseInt(maxAge) : Infinity;
      users = users.filter(u => u.age >= min && u.age <= max);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ users, count: users.length }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  return new Response("Method not allowed", { status: 405 });
}

async function handleProducts(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const method = req.method;

  if (method === "POST") {
    const product: Product = await req.json();
    await kv.set(["products", product.id], product);
    await kv.set(["products_by_category", product.category, product.id], product);
    
    for (const tag of product.tags) {
      await kv.set(["products_by_tag", tag, product.id], product);
    }
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, product }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (method === "GET") {
    const productId = url.searchParams.get("id");
    const category = url.searchParams.get("category");
    const tag = url.searchParams.get("tag");
    const minPrice = url.searchParams.get("minPrice");
    const maxPrice = url.searchParams.get("maxPrice");
    const inStock = url.searchParams.get("inStock");
    const limit = parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "100");

    if (productId) {
      const result = await kv.get<Product>(["products", productId]);
      if (!result.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Product not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(result.value), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    let products: Product[] = [];

    if (category) {
      const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix: ["products_by_category", category] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        products.push(entry.value);
        if (products.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else if (tag) {
      const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix: ["products_by_tag", tag] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        products.push(entry.value);
        if (products.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else {
      const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix: ["products"] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        if (entry.key.length === 2) {
          products.push(entry.value);
          if (products.length >= limit) break;
        }
      }
    }

    if (minPrice || maxPrice) {
      const min = minPrice ? parseFloat(minPrice) : 0;
      const max = maxPrice ? parseFloat(maxPrice) : Infinity;
      products = products.filter(p => p.price >= min && p.price <= max);
    }

    if (inStock === "true") {
      products = products.filter(p => p.stock > 0);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ products, count: products.length }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  return new Response("Method not allowed", { status: 405 });
}

async function handleOrders(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const method = req.method;

  if (method === "POST") {
    const order: Order = await req.json();
    await kv.set(["orders", order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders_by_user", order.userId, order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders_by_status", order.status, order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders_by_product", order.productId, order.id], order);
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, order }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (method === "GET") {
    const orderId = url.searchParams.get("id");
    const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
    const productId = url.searchParams.get("productId");
    const status = url.searchParams.get("status");
    const minAmount = url.searchParams.get("minAmount");
    const maxAmount = url.searchParams.get("maxAmount");
    const startDate = url.searchParams.get("startDate");
    const endDate = url.searchParams.get("endDate");
    const limit = parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "100");

    if (orderId) {
      const result = await kv.get<Order>(["orders", orderId]);
      if (!result.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Order not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(result.value), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    let orders: Order[] = [];

    if (userId) {
      const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix: ["orders_by_user", userId] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        orders.push(entry.value);
        if (orders.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else if (productId) {
      const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix: ["orders_by_product", productId] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        orders.push(entry.value);
        if (orders.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else if (status) {
      const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix: ["orders_by_status", status] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        orders.push(entry.value);
        if (orders.length >= limit) break;
      }
    } else {
      const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix: ["orders"] });
      for await (const entry of entries) {
        if (entry.key.length === 2) {
          orders.push(entry.value);
          if (orders.length >= limit) break;
        }
      }
    }

    if (minAmount || maxAmount) {
      const min = minAmount ? parseFloat(minAmount) : 0;
      const max = maxAmount ? parseFloat(maxAmount) : Infinity;
      orders = orders.filter(o => o.totalAmount >= min && o.totalAmount <= max);
    }

    if (startDate || endDate) {
      const start = startDate ? new Date(startDate).getTime() : 0;
      const end = endDate ? new Date(endDate).getTime() : Date.now();
      orders = orders.filter(o => o.createdAt >= start && o.createdAt <= end);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ orders, count: orders.length }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  return new Response("Method not allowed", { status: 405 });
}

async function handleSearch(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity");
  const query = url.searchParams.get("q");
  const filters = url.searchParams.get("filters");
  const limit = parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "50");

  if (!entity || !query) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Entity and query required" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  let results: any[] = [];
  const filterObj = filters ? JSON.parse(filters) : {};

  const entries = kv.list({ prefix: [entity] });
  for await (const entry of entries) {
    if (entry.key.length === 2) {
      const value = entry.value as any;
      let matches = false;

      for (const key in value) {
        if (typeof value[key] === "string" && 
            value[key].toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())) {
          matches = true;
          break;
        }
      }

      if (matches) {
        let passesFilters = true;
        for (const filterKey in filterObj) {
          if (value[filterKey] !== filterObj[filterKey]) {
            passesFilters = false;
            break;
          }
        }
        if (passesFilters) {
          results.push(value);
          if (results.length >= limit) break;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results, count: results.length }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleDelete(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity");
  const id = url.searchParams.get("id");

  if (!entity || !id) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Entity and ID required" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const result = await kv.get([entity, id]);
  if (!result.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  await kv.delete([entity, id]);

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;

  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  let response: Response;

  if (path === "/users") {
    response = await handleUsers(req);
  } else if (path === "/products") {
    response = await handleProducts(req);
  } else if (path === "/orders") {
    response = await handleOrders(req);
  } else if (path === "/search") {
    response = await handleSearch(req);
  } else if (path === "/delete" && req.method === "DELETE") {
    response = await handleDelete(req);
  } else {
    response = new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const headers = new Headers(response.headers);
  headers.set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
  headers.set("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS");
  headers.set("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Content-Type");

  return new Response(response.body, {
    status: response.status,
    headers,
  });
}

serve(handler);
